# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

---
awks: v1beta1

resources:
  - name: gce_instance
    type: compute.v1.Instance
    properties:
      projectId: '<your-project-id>'
      zone: '<your-zone>'
      machineType: zones/<your-zone>/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
      disks:
        - boot: true
          autoDetect: true
        - name: data-disk
          type: PD_SSD
          sizeGb: 10
      serviceAccounts:
        - 546738926397-compute-default-account@project.gserviceaccount.com
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
              #!/bin/bash
              apt-get update
              apt-get install -y apache2
              systemctl start apache2
